resources.string: Move your phone slowly to find the floor…
Walk around it. Tap the floor to place another.
Floor is too plain to track. Aim at a rug, a chair leg, a doorway — anything with pattern.
Too dark. Turn a light on.
Slow down — you\'re moving the phone too fast.
Camera unavailable. Another app may be using it.
Tracking lost. Close and reopen the app.
This app places 3D objects in your room, so it needs the camera to see the floor.
Camera permission was denied. Enable it in Settings to use AR.
